mapper.select: SELECT b.sfid, b.name, b.bankname, b.banknamekana, b.bankcode, b.branchcode, b.branchname, b.branchnamekana, b.lastmodifieddate FROM bankmaster b WHERE b.sfid=#{id}
SELECT b.sfid, b.name, b.bankname, b.banknamekana, b.bankcode, b.branchcode, b.branchname, b.branchnamekana, b.lastmodifieddate FROM bankmaster b WHERE b.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY b.sfid DESC

SELECT b.sfid, b.name, b.bankname, b.banknamekana, b.bankcode, b.branchcode, b.branchname, b.branchnamekana, b.lastmodifieddate FROM bankmaster b WHERE(date_trunc('second',b.lastmodifieddate) >=${startTime}) ORDER BY b.sfid DESC
SELECT b.sfid FROM bankmaster b WHERE b.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY b.sfid DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bankmaster (sfid, name, bankname, banknamekana, bankcode, branchcode, branchname, branchnamekana, lastmodifieddate) VALUES (#{sfid}, #{name}, #{bankname}, #{banknamekana}, #{bankcode}, #{branchcode}, #{branchname}, #{branchnamekana}, #{lastmodifieddate})
mapper.update: UPDATE bankmaster SET name=#{name}, bankname=#{bankname}, banknamekana=#{banknamekana}, bankcode=#{bankcode}, branchcode=#{branchcode}, branchname=#{branchname}, branchnamekana=#{branchnamekana}, lastmodifieddate=#{lastmodifieddate} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bankmastersync (sfid, name, banknamekana, bankcode, branchcode, branchname, branchnamekana, syncedtime) VALUES (#{sfid}, #{name}, #{banknamekana}, #{bankcode}, #{branchcode}, #{branchname}, #{branchnamekana}, #{syncedtime})
mapper.update: UPDATE bankmastersync SET name=#{name}, banknamekana=#{banknamekana}, bankcode=#{bankcode}, branchcode=#{branchcode}, branchname=#{branchname}, branchnamekana=#{branchnamekana}, syncedtime=#{syncedtime} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
